---
title: "Demographic Analysis"
author: "Colin Maggard"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true 
    toc_depth: 2
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
params:
  version: "v1"
---

## Set up

```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse) 
library(dplyr)
options(conflicts.policy = "depends.ok")

source("https://github.com/jjcurtin/lab_support/blob/main/fun_eda.R?raw=true")
source("https://github.com/jjcurtin/lab_support/blob/main/format_path.R?raw=true")

path_panel <- format_path("llmpanel/data_raw/panel")
path_processed <- format_path("llmpanel/data_processed")
path_credentials <- format_path("other")
```

## get data
```{r}
panel_long <- read_csv(file.path(path_processed, "panel_long.csv"))
```

## select dem columns, remove other 29 rows per participant
```{r}
panel_collapsed <- panel_long |>
  distinct(subid, .keep_all = TRUE)

panel_dem <- panel_collapsed |>
  select(starts_with("dem"))
```

## Age Histogram
```{r}
summary(panel_dem$dem_age)

ggplot(panel_dem, aes(x = dem_age)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Age Distribution", x = "Age", y = "Count")
```

## Sex at Birth Pie Chart
```{r}
table(panel_dem$dem_sex)

panel_dem |>
  count(dem_sex) |>
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n),
         label = scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 0.1)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = "", y = n, fill = dem_sex)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(aes(label = label),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "Sex at Birth", fill = "Sex at Birth")
```

## Sexual Orientation Bar Chart
```{r}
panel_dem |>
  count(dem_orientation) |>
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n),
         dem_orientation = fct_reorder(dem_orientation, pct)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = pct, y = dem_orientation, fill = dem_orientation)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1)), hjust = -0.1) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Sexual Orientation", x = NULL, y = NULL)
```

## Race Bar Chart
```{r}
panel_dem_race <- panel_dem |>
  select(starts_with("dem_race"), dem_hispanic) |>
  mutate(race = case_when(
    dem_race_multiple == "yes"          ~ "Multiracial",
    dem_race_white == "yes"             ~ "White",
    dem_race_black == "yes"             ~ "Black",
    dem_race_asian == "yes"             ~ "Asian",
    dem_hispanic == "yes"               ~ "Hispanic/Latinx",
    dem_race_native_alaskan == "yes"    ~ "Native/Alaskan",
    dem_race_hawaiian_pacific == "yes"  ~ "Hawaiian/Pacific Islander",
    TRUE                                ~ NA_character_
  ))

panel_dem_race |>
  filter(!is.na(race)) |>
  count(race) |>
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n),
         race = fct_reorder(race, pct, .desc = TRUE)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = race, y = pct, fill = race)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1)), vjust = -0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Race/Ethnicity", x = NULL, y = NULL)
# note: race_other had only one entry, which said Portuguese
```

## Education Bar Chart
```{r}
panel_dem |>
  count(dem_education) |>
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n),
         dem_education = fct_reorder(dem_education, pct)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = pct, y = dem_education, fill = dem_education)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(pct, accuracy = 1)), hjust = -0.1) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Education", x = NULL, y = NULL)
```
